ip_outcome_note: Card name explicitly reads 'Assailant Vegeta' — the depicted figure is the named character Vegeta. The official DBS card database assigns BT1-037 to the Resurrection F Saga era. The vision description (compact stocky figure in dark bodysuit/armor, upswept spiky dark hair) matches Vegeta's canonical character design in his Saiyan armor. Card name is oracle-text evidence per the no-conflation rule; identity is explicit.

trivia_bullets.text: BT1-037 is tagged to the Resurrection F Saga era on the DBS official card list, placing Vegeta's role in this card within the storyline of Dragon Ball Z: Resurrection F (2015), where Vegeta and Goku both train under Whis and Beerus to achieve SSGSS. The 'Assailant' title reflects Vegeta's aggressive combat role in that arc. [dbs-cardgame.com official card list; CoreTCG card entry]

Galactic Battle (BT1), released July 28, 2017, was the inaugural English DBS Card Game set — the first time Vegeta appeared as a named card in the English-language product line. The set's 30 Uncommons include multiple Vegeta variants (BT1-037 Assailant Vegeta, BT1-038 Vegeta Common), reflecting his central role in the game's launch roster. [Bleedingcool.com Galactic Battle Checklist; PSA Set Registry article]

BT1-037 is a 3-cost Blue Battle card with 15,000 power and the Critical keyword — forcing damage cards into the opponent's Drop Area instead of hand. Combo power is 5,000, lower than the BT1-032 Goku (10,000 combo), but its lower energy cost makes it easier to deploy in tempo-aggressive Blue builds. [CoreTCG card entry; DBZ Exchange product listing]

The Galactic Battle set launched with an official Super Saiyan Blue Son Goku starter deck and a parallel Blue build featuring Vegeta archetypes, reflecting Bandai's intent to establish the Goku/Vegeta rivalry as the game's structural axis from Day One. BT1's Blue strategy guide on dbs-cardgame.com specifically notes Vegeta cards as cornerstones of the Blue aggro archetype. [dbs-cardgame.com Blue and Yellow Strategy Guide, Galactic Battle]
